{{Infobox event
| name = Striker Trial
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Striker Trial]] is an open field of scorched, blasted soil.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] could not destroy the targets in the [[Striker Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Striker Trial]] involves targets and spears.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Striker Trial]] took ten days to pass.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
